creator: wahjava@gmail.com
text:
Gabor PALI writes:
> Hello Ashish (maintainer of x11/hs-x11-xft-ghc),

> Please note that PR ports/140041 has been submitted.

> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and I will take care of it.

> The full text of the PR can be found at:
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/140041

I tried it and I'm running it since few days. So, I approve the patch.

> Cheers,
> :g

Thanks
-- 
Ashish SHUKLA
